data.name: WelcomeSubtitle
data.value: Select a puzzle below to calculate the perfect walkthrough algorithm.

data.name: WaterSortDesc
data.value: Sort colored liquids in tubes into solid colors with minimal moves.

data.name: MahjongDesc
data.value: Automatically analyze complex multi-layered 3D tile layouts.

data.name: DatabaseDesc
data.value: Browse available tile types, patterns, and categories.
